productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ess 3s Suit Black Tracksuits
description: Composition Black full sleeves front zippered track jacket, made of 100% polyester, has a mesh lining inside, adidas' patented 3-Stripes appliqued on the sleeves in shades of green, brand name and logo embroidered on left chest, has side pockets and is engineered with ClimaLite technology Black full-length track pants made of 100% polyester, has adidas's patented 3-Stripes along the sides in shades of green, handy side zippered pockets, comfortable elastic waistband with inner drawstring, brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg, has zippered side slits towards the hem and is engineered with ClimaLite technology Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/embroidery Do not dry clean It's true that you can throw on a pair of shorts and t-shirt to go running, but try this black track suit from Adidas and you will never think of wearing anything else for your cross-training purposes! Attractively coloured with a mesh lining for ventilation, it is lightweight and warm at the same time. Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the suit draws sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Team this sporty track suit with performance shoes and get going for a fitter, leaner you! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18" The model wears trousers of length 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
